vocab.example: In many corporate cultures, wearing a watch is seen as a sign of professional etiquette and a serious attitude toward time.

vocab.meaning: kín đáo, không gây phiền toái
vocab.example: Checking a watch is much more unobtrusive than pulling out a phone, especially during a solemn ceremony or a lecture.
A traditional watch provides a distraction-free way to manage your schedule without the temptation of social media notifications.
Developing a punctual mindset is often easier when you have a dedicated timepiece constantly visible on your wrist.

vocab.meaning: tàn tích/dấu ấn của quá khứ
vocab.example: Some consider the wristwatch a vestige of the past, but for others, it remains a vital link to traditional craftsmanship.

vocab.meaning: sự tin cậy, độ bền vững
vocab.example: The reliability of a high-quality mechanical watch is unmatched, as it doesn't suffer from battery drainage or software glitches.

vocab.meaning: tối giản hóa, làm cho hiệu quả hơn
vocab.example: Having the time literally at hand helps to streamline your daily routine and minimize wasted moments.

vocab.meaning: lỗi hành xử xã hội (mất lịch sự)
vocab.example: Fiddling with a smartphone in a meeting to check the time is often regarded as a social faux pas, whereas glancing at a watch is acceptable.

vocab.meaning: có ý thức về thời gian
vocab.example: I believe being time-conscious is a vital life skill, and a watch serves as a constant anchor for that awareness.

vocab.meaning: sự tinh tế về thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Beyond utility, a watch adds a touch of aesthetic refinement to one's overall appearance, signaling attention to detail.
